headline: Landmark Investment Partners Cuts Howard Hughes Holdings Stake, According to Recent SEC Filing
summary: Howard Hughes is built on master-planned communities that can create value over decades and the pending Vantage deal could change how investors value that real estate engine.

headline: Los Angeles Mayor Bass, Former Mayor and Gubernatorial Candidate Villaraigosa to Join Hundreds of Civic and Commercial Real Estate Leaders on May 28 at Connect Los Angeles 2026
summary: LOS ANGELES, May 19, 2026--Connect Media, a privately held integrated media company and leading provider of commercial real estate news and conferences, has rounded out its speaker lineup for Connect CRE Los Angeles, a top annual conference bringing together Southern California civic leaders and key national commercial real estate industry figures.

headline: Q1 Earnings Outperformers: CBRE (NYSE:CBRE) And The Rest Of The Consumer Discretionary - Real Estate Services Stocks
